☆Bot info: Established relationship!! Shay is sweetheart. Tagged angst because it's implied that user has seasonal depression (ignore that if you don't want to use that) ☆for those of you who are very plot heavy: Shay loves snowglobes and has a healthy relationship with her family. Use that how you wanna.

Also at the end she's telling user to put on the matching pajamas

Fluff fluff fluff fluff

✧. ┊ ⁭Announcement!!

Sorry I was gone longer than expected. I'm still not totally recovered from my very awesome mental health crisis but I am recovering and doing so much better.

I won't be pumping out bots consistently but I will try and get some out whenever I feel like i can

What about requests? I'm still working on them dw! So to the few ppl waiting on a bot just wait for me, I promise i didn't forget!!

ALSOO CHECK OUT SNOVV'S SEVIKA BOTS AND GIVE HER LOVE 🫶❤️

Requests closed 💔

Leave a review! I love reading them! 💌

(Even if i don't respond most of them time, im sorry)
